title: Prefill
description: File the local orchestrator (or Agent365) writes into the legacy app's handoff `in\` folder. Derived from CallContext.

requested_by.description: Free-form identifier of the upstream system or agent that produced this prefill (e.g., 'ccaas-desktop:csr-acarter').

target_backend.description: Which AI backend the presenter routed this handoff to. A consumer that drives the Cloud PC via Computer Use MUST ignore a prefill not addressed to it, so two agents never drive the app at once. Omitted = legacy/unaddressed.

examples.summary: Rear-ended at intersection of 5th and Main, no injuries
